raw.message: Join real-time PvP and show your skills

hook.summary: Fast-paced mecha combat with satisfying kill streaks.
hook.visual_action: A flying robot fires at an enemy, triggering a 'KILL' UI notification and announcer voice.

scene_flow: In-game combat showing a flying robot securing a 'KILL' against an enemy.
Action intensifies with 'DOUBLE KILL' and 'TRIPLE KILL' streaks over an urban map.
Cinematic 3D transition into a high-tech robot assembly bay.
Final brand reveal with the game logo and 'INSTALL NOW' button.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy high-octane mecha combat and competitive action games.
